content: Remote OK Customer Solutions Technician Johnson Controls <strong>Exciting Career Opportunity Coming Soon!<br><br></strong>Attention all team members<br><br>We are excited to announce that a new position will be opening up within our organization soon. While we are still awaiting the final job description from the hiring manager, we wanted to give our talented internal candidates an early heads-up about this upcoming opportunity.<br><br><strong>Position Details<br><br></strong><ul><li>Title: Customer Solutions Technician</li><li>Reporting to: Sinead Farnan</li><li>Location: Letchworth Works Road<br><br></li></ul>We encourage anyone interested in exploring new career opportunities within our organization to stay informed. As soon as we receive the job description, we will update this page with the full details, including key responsibilities and required qualifications.<br><br>In the meantime, if you have any questions or would like to express your preliminary interest, please reach out to the Recruiter.<br><br>More information will be available soon recruiter, exec Letchworth, 2026-06-18T22:04:17+00:00 1133699 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-customer-solutions-technician-johnson-controls-1133699 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Graphic Designer Swoon <p><strong>Location:</strong> Fully Remote</p><p><strong>Duration:</strong> 6-Month Contract with Potential Extension</p><p><strong>Schedule:</strong> MondayâFriday | Standard Business Hours</p><p><br></p><p><strong>About the Opportunity</strong></p><p>This role is ideal for a highly creative presentation design professional who thrives at the intersection of visual storytelling, executive communications, and brand marketing. You'll partner with sales, marketing, and leadership teams to create impactful presentations for client meetings, conferences, executive speaking engagements, sales enablement initiatives, and major industry events.</p><p>The ideal candidate brings deep expertise in PowerPoint and Google Slides, exceptional typography and layout skills, experience developing scalable presentation templates, and a portfolio showcasing polished, visually compelling presentation work.</p><p><br></p><p><strong>Portfolio Required to Move Forward in Process</strong></p><p><br></p><p><strong>Key Responsibilities</strong></p><ul><li>Design and develop high-impact presentations for sales enablement, executive communications, conferences, webinars, client meetings, and marketing initiatives</li><li>Transform complex concepts, data, research, and marketing strategies into engaging visual narratives</li><li>Partner with sales and marketing stakeholders to ensure brand consistency and visual excellence across all materials</li><li>Create and maintain presentation templates, visual systems, icon libraries, and reusable design assets</li><li>Provide creative direction, feedback, and quality review for freelance presentation designers</li><li>Support high-priority executive presentations and keynote-level event materials</li><li>Ensure presentations reflect strong visual hierarchy, storytelling principles, and best-in-class design standards</li><li>Collaborate across marketing, sales, product, and leadership teams to deliver projects under tight timelines</li><li>Support occasional design projects including infographics, marketing collateral, and branded communications</li><li>Stay current on presentation design trends, visual storytelling techniques, and emerging design tools</li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>Required Qualifications</strong></p><ul><li>Advanced expertise with PowerPoint and Google Slides</li><li>Strong proficiency with Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign)</li><li>Experience working within agency, media, technology, advertising, or highly collaborative cross-functional environments</li><li>Demonstrated experience creating scalable presentation templates and design systems</li><li>Strong understanding of typography, layout, branding, visual hierarchy, and storytelling</li><li>Experience translating complex business concepts into clear and compelling visual communications</li><li>Exceptional attention to detail and ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously</li><li>Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills</li></ul><p><strong>Preferred Qualifications</strong></p><ul><li>Experience supporting executive communications, keynote presentations, TED-style talks, or large-scale conference presentations</li><li>Experience overseeing freelancers or external creative partners</li><li>Proficiency with Figma</li><li>Background supporting B2B marketing, advertising, media, or technology organizations</li><li>Experience within digital media, podcasting, streaming, or advertising industries</li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>If interested in learning more, please apply!</strong></p> hr, virtual assistant, medical New York, New York, United States 2026-06-18T21:14:38+00:00 1133676 Core markets include <strong>adult, performance, and clinical nutrition</strong>, as well as mainstream food and beverage applications, leveraging Kinisla's portfolio of milk proteins, nutritional and bioactive dairy ingredients, casein, and specialty dairy powders.<br><br><strong><strong>Key responsibilities:<br><br></strong></strong><ul><li>Own full commercial and margin responsibility for assigned strategic accounts, including budgeting, forecasting, pricing, contract negotiation, and performance tracking</li><li>Drive growth opportunities aligned to the strategic plan and active project pipeline, coordinating closely with R&amp;D and technical teams from concept through launch</li><li>Serve as the primary senior point of contact for customers, building strong relationships across procurement, R&amp;D, and manufacturing organizations</li><li>Lead and coordinate crossâfunctional teams (Supply Chain, Operations, Quality, R&amp;D, Marketing) to ensure flawless execution and high customer satisfaction</li><li>Contribute to overall business development strategy
